ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brianna Mannion for SF Public Administrator. (via zoom).

Ms. Mannion stated that she filed two separate declarations and has not heard off any objections. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Oct-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator (petitioner).

Mrs. Mannion stated that she has nothing to add, that the issues have been addressed thoroughly on the attachment to the petition, that the will fails and that the will offers no benefit to the estate. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
